must_not_assert: a dump file was created; this EID10-only package contains no file-create telemetry
credentials were successfully extracted or used

the_trap: Named dumping tools access LSASS with dump-capable rights and a comsvcs dumping call trace. One ordinary svchost access (EV-001) must not cause a downgrade, but the package also must not be stretched into a claim that a dump file or recovered credentials were observed.
rationale: A0, EV-002, and EV-003 show named dumping processes opening LSASS with dump-capable access masks (0x1010, 0x1410, and 0x1fffff), including a comsvcs call trace and the correct tool-to-LSASS direction. This decisively establishes offensive credential-access behavior. The EID10-only package does not show a dump file or credential extraction. EV-001 is an ordinary 0x1400 svchost access and does not negate the offensive accesses.
